name: Lamb Chops Korabiak
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt half of the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add mushrooms and onions to the skillet and sauté until tender, about 5 to 10 minutes. Remove and keep warm.
3. Melt the remaining butter in the same skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Sprinkle the lamb chops with rosemary, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
5. Add the lamb chops to the skillet and sauté until browned on both sides for about 5 minutes.
6. Reduce the heat to medium and continue cooking until the lamb is tender.
7. Transfer the lamb chops to a heated platter.
8. Pour the wine into the skillet and cook over medium-high heat, scraping up any browned bits clinging to the bottom of the pan, until the liquid has reduced by about one-third.
9. Spoon the vegetables over the lamb chops and top with the sauce.
